Here is a sample PlantUML diagram:
```
+label    !Species    !Feature 7 (0/1/2)
(Label 0: species name, Feature 7: species description)
```
The diagram should be clear, well-structured, and follow PlantUML best practices. The species label is `species name`, feature 7 is `feature 7` in the case of species, as this will create an error indicating that the species is missing;
+label    !Feature 7 (0/1/2) should be `feature 7`: species name
The function body has an empty function label and should not be styled with @startuml. The function should also have a @endumel tag to make it clear that it is part of the diagram;
+label    !Feature 7 (0/1/2) should be `feature 7`: species description
The function body has an empty function label and should not be styled with @startuml. The function should also have a @endumel tag to make it clear that it is part of the diagram;
```
Here are some examples of PlantUML diagrams:
| Species | Feature 1 (0/1/2) | Feature 2 (0/1/3) | Feature 3 (0/1/4) | Feature 4 (0/1/5) | Feature 5 (0/1/6) |
+label    !Species name: Species description (0/1/2)
| Species | Feature 7 (0/1/2) | Feature 8 (0/1/3) | Feature 9 (0/1/4) | Feature 10 (0/1/5) | Feature 11 (0/1/6) |
+label    !Feature 7 (0/1/2) should be `feature 7`: species description (0/1/3) (to make it clear that the species is missing);
| Feature 8 (0/1/3) | Feature 9 (0/1/4) | Feature 10 (0/1/5) | Feature 11 (0/1/6) | Feature 12 (0/1/7) |
+label    !Feature 7 (0/1/2) should be `feature 8`: species description (0/1/3) (to make it clear that the species is missing);

To create a PlantUML diagram with missing species labels, you can follow these steps:

1. Define the species (species label)
2. Define the feature 7 (species description) in the case of species, as well as the function body to make it clear that it is part of the diagram
3. Add a @endumel tag to the function body to make it clear that it is part of the diagram
4. Write @startuml and @enduml tags for all missing species labels in the diagram
5. Create a @startuml and @enduml tags for any remaining species descriptions in the diagram, as well as the function body to make them clear

+label    !Species description (0/1/2)
